summary: Iteration 11: Mobile Design Improvements - ALL 6 UI CHANGES VERIFIED. Tested on mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x800) viewports.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 mobile design improvements verified working on both viewports. Key data-testids: city-link-san-francisco, city-link-daly-city, how-it-works-mobile-step-1 through 4. Lazy-loaded sections (service-area) require scrolling to trigger load.

TEST_1_New_Round_Logo.details: New round FixitBay logo (navbar-logo-new-256.webp) displayed in navbar with rounded-full class, 56x56 dimensions

TEST_2_Navbar_Text.details: Mobile navbar shows 'FixitBay LLC' and 'Appliance Repair & Maintenance' text next to logo (fills empty space)

TEST_3_Intro_3_Cards.details: 3-card intro layout: 'In-Home Appliance Repair', 'Transparent Pricing', 'Book Today' all visible

TEST_4_How_It_Works_Vertical.details: Mobile How It Works shows 4 steps as vertical compact list (not horizontal scroll). data-testid='how-it-works-mobile-step-1' through 4 all visible

TEST_5_Trust_Bar_No_License.details: Trust bar does NOT contain 'CA #51001'. 4 red SVG icons present (stroke=#C0362C)

TEST_5b_Trust_Bar_Items.details: All 4 trust items with red icons: Licensed & Insured, Serving Bay Area Since 2023, 500+ Repairs Completed, 180-Day Warranty

TEST_6_City_List_No_Scroll.details: Where We Serve shows 22 city links as clickable tag chips in flex-wrap layout (no vertical scroll overflow)

TEST_1_Round_Logo.details: Round FixitBay logo displayed in desktop navbar

TEST_2_Navbar_Text.details: Desktop navbar shows 'FixitBay LLC' and 'Appliance Repair & Maintenance' text

TEST_3_Intro_Cards.details: 3 intro cards visible in grid layout

TEST_4_How_It_Works.details: How It Works shows 4 cards in horizontal row with connector arrows

TEST_5_Trust_Bar.details: No CA #51001 license number in trust bar, red icons present

TEST_6_City_Links.details: Where We Serve shows all cities (San Francisco, Peninsula 8 cities, North Bay/Marin 13 cities) as clickable tag chips

San_Francisco_Page.details: URL /san-francisco-appliance-repair loads correctly, H1: 'Appliance Repair in San Francisco & Bay Area'

Daly_City_Page.details: URL /daly-city-appliance-repair loads correctly, H1: 'Appliance Repair in Daly City'

verified_changes: 1. Navbar logo: New round FixitBay logo (navbar-logo-new-*.webp) with rounded-full class
2. Mobile navbar text: 'FixitBay LLC' + 'Appliance Repair & Maintenance' visible via flex sm:hidden container
3. Intro section: 3 cards (In-Home Appliance Repair, Transparent Pricing, Book Today) in grid layout
4. How It Works mobile: Vertical list with data-testid='how-it-works-mobile-step-{1-4}' via sm:hidden container
5. Trust bar: CA #51001 removed, red SVG icons (stroke=#C0362C) before each trust item
6. Where We Serve: Cities in flex-wrap layout, no overflow-y-auto, all 22 cities visible as clickable tags
